main_problems: the seating side already carries most of the visual weight
the space needs to preserve a walking path
the window / frosted-panel side is the best natural light source, so seating should relate to it
rug_policy: furn_08.png is the reference cozy choice, but furn_03.png can be acceptable if the plan gives a grounded visual/space reason and still preserves comfort and walkway clearance.

layout.chair: angle the lounge chair toward the window side without blocking the walking path
layout.table: place the round side table on the open side of the chair for a book or drink
layout.lamp: put the floor lamp on the darker side behind or beside the chair
layout.rug: center the wool rug to define the nook but keep the path clear
